textByHash.02558ba43af644ba773bcbe5e801a47c80f18167: Are you trying to get me fired?
textByHash.07745a762f80cf55231e426a40f7933d2af1215c: Hurry up, get in the cart or I'll go without you!
textByHash.0c3bfd24ec524354574e8fc0e27b0490395a30bd: What're you doing carrying that big barrel around? Put it in the back of the cart like all the others!
textByHash.16fcd70d1e304ed10e0e7c7684a6e7947eea0744: Hmm, well, I wonder what the guards are gonna say about that! Guards! Guards!
textByHash.2b64758135762a8c12f807a3081ccab3d25edb3a: No way, and if you bug me again, I'm gonna call the guards.
textByHash.2e65738b88690eb2de270cbea915b0c315cd709e: Sorry friend, I'm busy, go bug the guards, I'm sure they'll give ya the time of day.
textByHash.36d75d3383c6af54b0ebeaacb7c90e0b47b98fd3: Can't you see I'm busy? Now get out of here!
textByHash.3f33f97bee80885ad24eb06cae179e5ced086260: What! Can't you see I'm busy?
textByHash.4dab7cc3611678eeae17c4d5173fac8de87babfa: If you're going to bribe me, at least make it worth my while. Now, let's say 100 Gold pieces should we? Ha ha ha!
textByHash.525abb128858161faaa17291f6a56578d96c01c6: I'm quite capable thanks... Now get lost before I call the guards.
textByHash.6141b945a0b3cc4146b6ce15bf1cd5cb76fcf01b: -- The cart driver smirks a little. --
textByHash.689a806e87299cf487f58806e38a42a1bcd64060: Hmmm, interesting... let me guess. You're completely innocent... like all the other inmates in here. Ha ha ha!
textByHash.78939528a1aac6a2e6bd30ce33a4dbe31ddef231: Are you saying I don't know anything about carts?
textByHash.865875571f1aeb317ec566627fa03d49544fc084: Why you cheeky little.... -- The cart driver seems mortally offended -- -- his temper explodes as he calls the guards.-- Guards! Guards!
textByHash.88bd37ceaba6418a6612a0c5486d065dcc32d9d9: Okay, get in the back of the cart then!
textByHash.91299132137ad425deadfed4e57ead72dd7f0e76: Don't trouble me, can't you see I'm busy?
textByHash.97fb075acd721896695ebb221c742145b3d10003: It certainly sounds like it, now leave me alone. If you bug me again, I'm gonna call the guards.
textByHash.9a571cc65141cb173076de5dbdc72ddb36822483: As long as your friend is a barrel full of rocks. I don't think it would be a problem at all! Ha ha ha!
textByHash.bccdfa4c1daef1db7b649669ff10e4287da47435: You little cheat, trying to trick me! I'll show you! Guards! Guards!
textByHash.bce275ff2e474e44665002e3f7dc45d7067cf772: Okay, fair enough! But don't bother me anymore.
textByHash.c4d8e83c813fe1ad194781fe9e5e773825f412d2: Ha ha ha! You're funny! -- The cart driver checks that guards aren't watching. -- What're you in fer?
textByHash.c4d95f35f88c8294a5ade498c6ca570b55201b7c: And why would you want to do a crazy thing like that for? I ought to teach you a lesson! Guards! Guards!
textByHash.d18082b2612bf15eb472d0b8fde26ed30dc55ab2: Oh, right... Okay, you'd better jump in the cart then! Quickly!
textByHash.df35e8f26699d3684f0c28203f07e521bfadcde2: Ha ha ha, oh stop it!
textByHash.efd5a2591f9f0079ccb90a6c23e05bbd24afa700: Ask that man over there if it's okay and I'll consider it! Ha ha ha!
textByHash.fc09b535cfeccc81b0574917c8f0d492f9930e44: What can I do for you anyway?
